data.content: I can see the problem. The `GenerateSampleCode` target generates `GeneratedInfo.cs` but never adds it to the `Compile` item group, so the compiler doesn't know about it. Let me fix this.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Include the generated file in compilation and register for clean -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
      <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

data.reasoningText:
The issue is clear. The `GenerateSampleCode` target runs `BeforeTargets="CoreCompile;BeforeCompile"` and generates the file, but it never adds the generated file to the `Compile` item group. The file is written to disk but the compiler doesn't know about it.

The fix is to add the generated file to the `Compile` item group and also register it in `FileWrites` so it gets cleaned properly.

Let me use the `including-generated-files` skill since it's directly relevant.

arguments.new_str:
<Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Include the generated file in compilation and register for clean -->
    <ItemGroup>
      <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
      <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
    </ItemGroup>
  </Target>

  </Target>", "new_str": "    <Message Importance="high" Text="Generated code file: $(_GeneratedFilePath)" />

    <!-- Include the generated file in compilation and register for clean -->

data.content:
Build succeeds now. Here's the diagnosis and fix:

**Problem:** The `GenerateSampleCode` target writes `GeneratedInfo.cs` to disk but never tells the compiler about it. MSBuild globs expand at evaluation time (before targets run), so dynamically created files aren't automatically included.

**Fix:** Added the generated file to the `Compile` item group (so it's compiled) and `FileWrites` (so `Clean` removes it) inside the target after the file is written:

```xml
<ItemGroup>
  <Compile Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
  <FileWrites Include="$(_GeneratedFilePath)" />
</ItemGroup>
```
